headline: NFL approves sale of 3.5% of Las Vegas Raiders at over $11 billion valuation
summary: The National Football League has approved the sale of 7% of the Las Vegas Raiders at a valuation of more than $11 billion.

raw.headline: NFL approves sale of 3.5% of Las Vegas Raiders at over $11 billion valuation

headline: Why Losing the Warner Bros. Deal May Be the Best Outcome for Netflix Stock
summary: Since losing the Warner Bros. deal, markets are pushing up NFLX stock, and analysts are bullish. See why focusing on organic growth may be Netflix's best path forward.

raw.headline: Why Losing the Warner Bros. Deal May Be the Best Outcome for Netflix Stock
raw.summary: Since losing the Warner Bros. deal, markets are pushing up NFLX stock, and analysts are bullish. See why focusing on organic growth may be Netflix's best path forward.

headline: Netflix May Have Good Reason To Raise Prices: Streamer Eyes More NFL Games
summary: Netflix wants more NFL games, an item that could justify price increases and grow advertising revenue for the streaming platform.

headline: 'Project Hail Mary' is the box office proof point Amazon MGM has been waiting for
summary: Amazon and MGM promised to spend around $1 billion each year on theatrical releases, a figure that would fund between 12 and 15 films annually.

headline: Eric Trump Unveils Father's Presidential Library In Miami, Calls It  'Lasting Testament To An Amazing Man'
summary: Eric Trump unveils the Donald Trump Presidential Library in Miami, sharing exclusive first-look images and celebrating his father's legacy.
